title: nats-bursting: polite, container-native cloud bursting for AI workloads over a federated NATS fabric
description: Container-native cloud-bursting fabric for AI/ML batch workloads on shared multi-tenant clusters (e.g., NRP Nautilus): a federated NATS leaf-node control plane, an AIMD politeness/admission controller with a measured policy-violation bound, and transport (turboquant-pro) plus Kalman-filtered thermal GPU right-sizing (batch-probe). This release is the snapshot accompanying the IEEE INFOCOM 2027 submission 'Polite Bursting'; it includes the assembled paper (paper/infocom.tex), the E1-E8 measurement harness, and the controlled-testbed goodput-politeness results.
